title: Judges, Magistrate Judges, and Magistrates
description: Arbitrate, advise, adjudicate, or administer justice in a court of law. May sentence defendant in criminal cases according to government statutes or sentencing guidelines. May determine liability of defendant in civil cases. May perform wedding ceremonies.

tasks.text: Sentence defendants in criminal cases, on conviction by jury, according to applicable government statutes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor proceedings to ensure that all applicable rules and procedures are followed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Instruct juries on applicable laws, direct juries to deduce the facts from the evidence presented, and hear their verdicts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write decisions on cases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read documents on pleadings and motions to ascertain facts and issues.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Rule on admissibility of evidence and methods of conducting testimony.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Preside over hearings and listen to allegations made by plaintiffs to determine whether the evidence supports the charges.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Award compensation for damages to litigants in civil cases in relation to findings by juries or by the court.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Advise attorneys, juries, litigants, and court personnel regarding conduct, issues, and proceedings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Research legal issues and write opinions on the issues.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interpret and enforce rules of procedure or establish new rules in situations where there are no procedures already established by law.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Issue arrest warrants.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Settle disputes between opposing attorneys.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Impose restrictions upon parties in civil cases until trials can be held.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise other judges, court officers, and the court's administrative staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Rule on custody and access disputes, and enforce court orders regarding custody and support of children.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct preliminary hearings to decide issues, such as whether there is reasonable and probable cause to hold defendants in felony cases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Grant divorces and divide assets between spouses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Participate in judicial tribunals to help resolve disputes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide information regarding the judicial system or other legal issues through the media and public speeches.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform wedding ceremonies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
